CustomField.description: Rollup count of NEPA_Flow_Error__c records whose nepa_record_id__c matches this application's Id. Increments automatically via a rollup summary flow (or Apex trigger in future) whenever a flow fault is logged. When this count exceeds a threshold, the SLA escalation flow fires a case and notifies the integration team. Text match rollup is not natively supported — this field is populated by NEPA_Error_Logger subflow incrementing it via a before-save flow on NEPA_Flow_Error__c insert.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Count of flow errors logged against this application. High counts trigger escalation.
CustomField.label: Flow Error Count
